name: second-corridor
description: The Second Corridor — tracking New York's semiconductor buildout, 2022–2045, from public data.

scripts.build: vite build && npm run lint:design && npm run lint:size
scripts.data: node scripts/fetch-qcew.mjs && node scripts/fetch-ipeds.mjs && node scripts/fetch-oews.mjs && node scripts/fetch-lodes.mjs && node scripts/fetch-usaspending.mjs && node scripts/fetch-bps.mjs && node scripts/fetch-acs.mjs && node scripts/fetch-nyiso.mjs
